description: Benchmark tests for tdd-enforcer skill - Enforces TDD workflow using RED-GREEN-REFACTOR cycle

evals.name: red-phase-enforcement
evals.prompt: 开发者想直接实现 UserService.create() 方法，还没有写任何测试。TDD Enforcer 应如何处理？

assertions.name: detects_missing_test
assertions.description: Should detect that no test exists before implementation

assertions.name: requires_test_first
assertions.description: Should require writing test before implementation
assertions.check: output.includes('先写') || output.includes('test first') || output.includes('写测试')

assertions.name: provides_test_template
assertions.description: Should provide guidance or template for writing the test
assertions.check: output.includes('def test_') || output.includes('test_create') || output.includes('assert') || output.includes('断言')

evals.name: green-phase-validation
evals.prompt: 测试 test_create_user_success 已经写好并且失败了（RED）。开发者实现了 UserService.create() 方法。TDD Enforcer 应验证 GREEN 阶段。

assertions.name: confirms_green_phase
assertions.description: Should confirm that tests are now passing (GREEN)

assertions.name: validates_minimal_implementation
assertions.description: Should validate that implementation is minimal to pass tests
assertions.check: output.includes('minimal') || output.includes('最小') || output.includes('只做') || output.includes('YAGNI')

assertions.name: suggests_next_step
assertions.description: Should suggest moving to REFACTOR phase
assertions.check: output.includes('REFACTOR') || output.includes('重构') || output.includes('refactor') || output.includes('下一步')

evals.name: refactor-phase-guidance
evals.prompt: 所有测试通过（GREEN）。代码中存在重复逻辑和复杂条件。TDD Enforcer 应指导 REFACTOR 阶段的安全重构。

assertions.name: identifies_refactor_targets
assertions.description: Should identify code smells to refactor
assertions.check: output.includes('重构') || output.includes('refactor') || output.includes('smell') || output.includes('重复')

assertions.name: ensures_tests_stay_green
assertions.description: Should emphasize keeping tests green during refactor
assertions.check: output.includes('测试') || output.includes('test') || output.includes('不破坏') || output.includes('保持')

assertions.name: provides_refactor_strategy
assertions.check: output.includes('extract') || output.includes('提取') || output.includes('简化') || output.includes('consolidate')

evals.name: strictness-level-advisory
evals.prompt: TDD Enforcer 以 Advisory 模式运行。开发者跳过了测试直接写实现代码。应该只发出警告，不阻断工作流。

assertions.name: issues_warning_not_block
assertions.description: Should issue a warning but not block the workflow
assertions.check: output.includes('警告') || output.includes('warning') || output.includes('建议') || output.includes('Advisory')

assertions.name: does_not_stop_execution
assertions.description: Should allow work to continue despite violation
assertions.check: output.includes('继续') || output.includes('continue') || output.includes('allowed') || output.includes('可以继续')

assertions.name: logs_violation
assertions.description: Should log or report the TDD violation for tracking
assertions.check: output.includes('记录') || output.includes('log') || output.includes('violation') || output.includes('违反')

evals.name: strictness-level-strict
evals.prompt: TDD Enforcer 以 Strict 模式运行。开发者试图提交没有测试覆盖的实现代码。应该阻止提交。

assertions.name: blocks_non_tdd_code
assertions.description: Should block the commit due to missing test coverage
assertions.check: output.includes('block') || output.includes('阻止') || output.includes('Strict') || output.includes('拒绝')

assertions.name: explains_violation
assertions.description: Should clearly explain what the TDD violation is
assertions.check: output.includes('coverage') || output.includes('覆盖') || output.includes('测试') || output.includes('test')

assertions.name: provides_remediation
assertions.description: Should provide clear steps to remediate the violation
assertions.check: output.includes('步骤') || output.includes('step') || output.includes('先写') || output.includes('需要')
